profileUnavailableDesc: We couldn't load your profile right now. Please try again.
profileUnavailableOfflineDesc: You're offline and no local profile data is available yet.
deleteAccountWarning: This action will permanently delete your account and all your data. Please enter your password to confirm.
profileDetailsIntro: Update how your account appears and how you sign in.
legalPrivacyHubRowSubtitle: Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Data & AI clarity, and data export
legalPrivacyHubIntro: Review the documents and plain-language summaries that explain how Fitaly handles your account, data, and AI features.
legalPrivacyHubInfoBody: Use these screens for the current legal documents, data-use summary, and account-data export actions.
privacyPolicySubtitle: Read the full policy that applies to the app today.
termsOfServiceSubtitle: Open the current terms in your browser.
dataAiClaritySubtitle: See a plain-language summary of what data the app uses and where AI is involved.
dataAiClarityIntro: This screen summarizes how Fitaly uses your data and where AI is involved. It does not replace the full Privacy Policy.
dataAiClaritySummaryBody: Fitaly uses the information you add to provide meal logging, nutrition history, and the AI features you choose to use.
dataAiClarityCollectedAccountBody: Your email address and profile details such as weight, height, age, gender, and nutrition goal.
dataAiClarityCollectedMealsBody: Your meal history and any meal photos you upload for tracking or analysis.
dataAiClarityAiPhotoBody: Meal photos are sent through Fitaly’s backend AI flow to estimate nutritional information.
dataAiClarityAiSuggestionBody: When you use diet-related AI features, only the needed context is sent through Fitaly’s backend to generate responses.
dataAiClarityAiTrainingBody: Fitaly does not use this data to train its own models. Data sent to providers is used to deliver the features you request.
dataAiClarityProcessorsFirebaseBody: Used for authentication, database storage, and app analytics.
dataAiClarityProcessorsOpenAiBody: Used as a model provider for meal-photo analysis and diet-related AI features when you request them.
dataAiClarityControlsFooter: For the full legal wording and contact details, open the Privacy Policy from Legal & privacy.
dataAiClarityControlsExportBody: You can export your account data and use the delete-account flow directly from your account area.
dataAiClarityControlsPrivacyBody: Open the full Privacy Policy for the complete legal document.
downloadYourDataSubtitle: Export a copy of your account data
helpFeedbackSubtitle: Share a suggestion, issue, or question
helpFeedbackHubRowSubtitle: Contact support or send a suggestion from inside the app
helpFeedbackHubIntro: Choose the path that best matches what you need: support for account or technical issues, and feedback for product ideas or bug reports.
helpFeedbackHubInfoBody: Support opens your email app to contact Fitaly directly. Feedback sends a message through the existing in-app feedback endpoint.
contactSupportSubtitle: Account, billing, privacy, or technical issues that need a direct reply.
contactSupportIntro: Use support for account, billing, privacy, or technical issues that need a direct reply.
contactSupportInfoBody: Tapping the button opens your email app with a draft addressed to the support contact already listed in Fitaly’s legal documents.
contactSupportFooter: If you only want to share a suggestion or product idea, use Send feedback instead.
contactSupportBestForBody: Login problems, billing questions, privacy requests, or broken flows that need help from the team.
contactSupportUnavailableBody: We couldn’t open an email app on this device. You can still contact support at {{email}}.
contactSupportErrorBody: Please try again or email {{email}} directly from your preferred email app.
appSettingsIntro: Manage app-level preferences like appearance, language, and notification settings.
appSettingsInfoBody: These settings apply to how Fitaly looks and how it sends reminders on this device.
darkModeSubtitle: Use the darker theme across the app
languageSubtitle: Choose the language used across the app
languageScreenIntro: Choose the language used across your account and the rest of the app.
languageInfoBody: The selected language applies across Fitaly and updates after the change is saved.
deleteAccountSubtitle: Permanently remove your account and data
profilePhotoSubtitle: Take a photo or choose one from your library
photoSourceDescription: Choose how you want to update your profile photo for now.
profilePhotoScreenIntro: Choose how you want to update the photo shown on your account.
profilePhotoCameraSubtitle: Take a new photo with the camera
profilePhotoGallerySubtitle: Choose an image from your library
profilePhotoInfoBody: You can update your photo again any time from Profile Details.
changeUsernameIntro: Choose the name shown across your account.
usernameInfoBody: Your username appears on your profile and can be changed again later.
usernameCurrentHelper: This is already your current username.
changeEmailIntro: Enter the new email address you want to use for your account.
verifyNewEmailIntro: We’ve sent a verification message to your new address. Confirm it to finish updating your account.
verifyNewEmailSentBody: Open the message sent to {{email}} and follow the link to confirm your new email address.
verifyNewEmailResendUnavailable: Resend is not available from this screen yet. If you need another verification email, go back and submit the change again.
changePasswordIntro: Choose a new password for your account. You’ll need your current one to confirm.
passwordInfoBody: For security, confirm your current password before saving a new one.

sync.pending: Profile changes are waiting to sync.
sync.conflict: Profile sync failed. We will retry automatically.

usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
emailChangeSecurityNote: You may be asked to log in again for security reasons.

manageSubscription.title: Manage subscription
manageSubscription.screenIntro: Review your current membership, AI Credits tier, and available subscription actions.
manageSubscription.benefitDesc_aiCredits800: Premium renews your balance to 800 AI Credits each billing period.
manageSubscription.benefitDesc_flexibleAiUsage: Spend AI Credits across chat, text analysis, and photo analysis based on your needs.
manageSubscription.benefitDesc_photoAnalysisIncluded: Use AI photo analysis whenever you have enough AI Credits.
manageSubscription.benefitDesc_fullCloudBackup:
Premium: Automatic, unlimited backup of all meals and settings. Restore your full history on any device.
Free: Limited backup and restore.
manageSubscription.benefitDesc_fullHistoryAccess:
Premium: Browse and analyze your entire history with advanced filters and time ranges.
Free: Access limited to the last 30 days.
manageSubscription.benefitDesc_earlyAccess:
Premium: Try upcoming features and tools before anyone else. Exclusive early access for premium members!
Free: New features become available after official release and some of them will never be able for free users.
manageSubscription.legalHubSubtitle: Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and Data & AI clarity.
manageSubscription.billingUnavailable: Billing is unavailable on this device.
manageSubscription.summaryTrialBody: Your trial is active. Premium features and premium AI Credits are currently available.
manageSubscription.summaryGraceBody: Premium is active, but billing needs attention. Update payment details to avoid interruption.
manageSubscription.summaryPendingDowngradeBody: Premium remains active for now, but it is scheduled to end at the close of the current period.
manageSubscription.summaryPausedBody: Premium is currently paused due to a billing issue. Restore billing to reactivate full access.
manageSubscription.summaryRefundedBody: A recent premium purchase appears refunded. Start a new subscription to restore premium access.
manageSubscription.summaryPremiumBody: Your account currently has access to premium features and the premium AI Credits tier.
manageSubscription.summaryExpiredBody: Your premium access is no longer active. You can renew when billing is available.
manageSubscription.summaryFreeBody: You’re currently on the free plan. Upgrade to unlock the premium AI Credits tier and additional account features.
manageSubscription.unavailableOfflineDesc: You're offline and subscription details are not available locally yet.
manageSubscription.offlineBody: Subscription details shown here may be outdated until you reconnect.
manageSubscription.manageInStoreSubtitle: Open your store account settings to manage or cancel.
manageSubscription.restoreSubtitle: Restore access if you already purchased premium on this account.
manageSubscription.refundSubtitle: Open the current store refund policy.
manageSubscription.devSectionFooter: Visible in development only. This does not change production billing behavior.
manageSubscription.devToggleSubtitle: Uses the existing dev-only billing override path.
manageSubscription.autorenewInfo: Payment will be charged to your account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel subscriptions in your {{storeName}} account settings.

password_min_length: Password must be at least {{count}} characters
new_password_must_be_different: New password must be different from current password
camera_permission_blocked_message: Camera access is currently disabled. Fitaly needs it to take profile photos. You can enable it in system Settings.
weak_password: The new password is too weak
camera_permission_message: Camera access is required to take meal photos and a profile photo.
sendFeedbackSubtitle: Ideas, suggestions, or bug reports you want to send from inside the app.
feedbackScreenIntro: Use feedback for product ideas, suggestions, or bug reports you want to send from inside the app.
feedbackSentIntro: Your message has been sent through Fitaly’s in-app feedback channel.
feedbackThankYouBody: We’ve received your message. If you need a direct reply about an account or technical issue, use Contact support.
feedbackInfoBody: Feedback is sent through Fitaly’s existing in-app feedback endpoint. You can include an optional screenshot.
feedbackAttachmentErrorBody: Please try again if you want to attach a screenshot.
addAttachmentDescription: Optional: attach a screenshot to help us understand the issue
feedbackAppInfo: Your app version and device info will be sent automatically to help us improve Fitaly.
checkConnection: Please check your connection and try again.
feedbackSendError: Failed to send feedback. Try again later.
exportSavedSuccess: Your data has been saved as a PDF: {{filename}}. A sharing window has been opened.

paywall.title: Premium monthly
paywall.hero_subtitle: Everything you need to reach your goals
paywall.disclaimer: Payment will be charged to your account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel subscriptions in your {{storeName}} account settings.
